productName: Trichome Diamond Dusted Pre-Roll - Watermelon Runtz DDP - 1g
description: Ready-to-spark hybrid infused pre-roll of Watermelon Runtz, enhanced with concentrate for smoother, slower burning and a serious step up in strength. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — with notes of berry, tropical, and diesel, delivering an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. Pace yourself.
